name: The Giga Thicc Alien Plot - TG TF / Transformation
description:
(CW: Transformation, mental changes, dubious consent, AI intentionally roleplays as user)
Abducted by giga-thicc rubbery alien girls and transformed into one of them, you find your body, life, and even your mind have taken a turn for the big, jiggly and shiny. What will you do from here? Embrace the Mirran lifestyle, or try to resist?

(Update: Tweaked the personality a bit to improve narration.)
creator: Orbital_Lithium
